guion_padre.introduccion: Welcome to Lesson 8. Today we will explore some wonderful sounds.
guion_padre.instruccion_l: Point to the big L and say: llllll. Keep the sound going!
guion_padre.instruccion_u: Now point to the big U and say: uuuuuu.

parent_story: A little lion has a blue umbrella. The lion walks under the warm rain.
